title: Recurring task board
excerpt: I am trying to create a board where a specified task can be assigned and once it is complete for that period, it will recreate itself, ie a recurring task to be tracked in Monday, any ideas?  I think I can do it with som…

posts.author: cbehmer (Carl Behmer)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to create a board where a specified task can be assigned and once it is complete for that period, it will recreate itself, ie a recurring task to be tracked in Monday, any ideas? I think I can do it with some complicated automation on every task, but I have about 40 I need to create.
